info.title: Poachy API Documentation
info.description: Multi-tenant POS and eCommerce Marketplace Platform API

post.description: Validate admin credentials and send OTP code to email. This is the first step of 2FA authentication.

message.example: OTP sent to your email. Please check and verify.

items.example: The provided credentials are incorrect.

post.description: Verify the OTP code sent to email and complete authentication. Returns bearer token on success.

items.example: Invalid OTP code. 2 attempts remaining.

post.description: Request a new OTP code if the previous one expired or was lost. This invalidates any existing OTP.
Create a new admin or support user. Requires admin role.

role.description: User role: admin (full access) or support (limited access)

items.example: The email has already been taken.

post.description: Reset password for another admin user. Requires admin role. All existing tokens for the target admin will be revoked.

admin_id.description: ID of the admin user to reset

post.description: Logout current admin user by revoking the current access token.

get.description: Get details of the currently authenticated admin user.
Admin retrieves all business details awaiting approval
Admin retrieves all business details with optional filters

post.description: Admin approves a business details submission
Admin rejects a business details submission
Admin adds or removes verification badge from business

is_verified.description: true to verify, false to unverify

get.description: Get paginated list of all tenants with their domains and business details.

post.description: Create a new tenant with domain(s). This will create the tenant database and assign domain(s).

items.example: merchant1.example.com
This domain is already assigned to another tenant.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific tenant including domains and business details.

delete.description: Delete a tenant and all associated data including database. This action is irreversible.

get.description: Search tenants by domain name or business name.

post.description: Add an additional domain to an existing tenant.

delete.description: Delete a domain. Cannot delete the last domain of a tenant.

400.description: Cannot delete last domain

message.example: Cannot delete the last domain. A tenant must have at least one domain.

patch.description: Update tenant metadata (name, notes, etc.).

post.description: Admin creates the first user for a tenant (stored in tenant's database)
Initiates a trial period for a specific tenant. The tenant must not have an existing active trial period. This creates a subscription with trial status.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the tenant to start trial for

trial_ends_at.description: The date when the trial period should end (YYYY-MM-DD format). Must be a future date.

subscription_id.description: The ID of the created subscription

is_trial.description: Indicates if this is a trial subscription

400.description: Bad request - Trial period cannot be started

error.example: Tenant already has an active trial period.

errors.error: Tenant already has an active trial period.

items.example: The trial ends at field is required.

get.description: Retrieves all subscription records for a specific tenant, including active, trial, expired, and cancelled subscriptions. Returns detailed information about each subscription period, payment details, and status.

plan_id.description: The ID of the subscription plan

plan_name.description: The name of the subscription plan

plan_slug.description: The slug of the subscription plan

end_date.description: Subscription end date (null for lifetime or ongoing subscriptions)

duration_days.description: Duration of subscription in days (null for lifetime)

payment_method.description: Payment method used (e.g., mpesa, card, bank_transfer)

is_active.description: Whether the subscription is currently active

is_trial.description: Whether this is a trial subscription

is_cancelled.description: Whether the subscription has been cancelled

get.description: Retrieves a list of all available subscription plans with optional filtering and sorting. This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

parameters.name: max_price
parameters.description: Maximum price filter (must be greater than min_price)

description.example: Perfect for getting started with basic POS features

data.name: Free
data.description: Perfect for getting started with basic POS features

items.example: The max price must be greater than min price.
The selected sort by is invalid.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific subscription plan using its slug identifier. This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: The unique slug identifier of the subscription plan (e.g., 'free', 'basic', 'premium', 'enterprise')

slug.example: No subscription plan found with name: test

errors.slug: No subscription plan found with name: test

post.description: Verify credentials and send OTP to email (2FA)

message.example: Verification code sent to your email

post.description: Verify OTP and receive authentication token
Resend verification code to email
Change temporary password to permanent one (for first-time users)

get.description: Get authenticated tenant user details

post.description: Logout tenant user and revoke token
Update tenant user password (requires current password)

message.example: Password updated successfully. Please login again.

422.description: Validation error - incorrect current password or weak new password

get.description: Get current tenant's business details submission

post.description: Tenant submits comprehensive business details including logo, banner, and operational information for admin approval (stored in central DB)

business_description.example: Leading electronics retailer offering the latest gadgets, computers, and accessories with competitive prices and excellent customer service.

business_logo.description: Business logo image (JPEG, PNG, JPG, WEBP - Max 2MB)

business_banner.description: Business banner image (JPEG, PNG, JPG, WEBP - Max 5MB)

address.example: Westlands Mall, Ground Floor, Shop G12

operating_hours.description: Weekly operating hours with open/close times in HH:MM format

201.description: Business details submitted successfully and awaiting admin approval

message.example: Business details submitted successfully. Awaiting admin approval.

business_description.example: Leading electronics retailer offering the latest gadgets, computers, and accessories with competitive prices and excellent customer service.

address.example: Westlands Mall, Ground Floor, Shop G12

400.description: Business details already submitted

message.example: Business details already submitted. Please contact admin for updates.

422.description: Validation error - Invalid or missing required fields

business_name: The business name field is required.
business_logo: The business logo must be an image.
The business logo must not exceed 2MB.

patch.description: Update business name, description, email, phone, and contact person

post.description: Update business logo and banner images

patch.description: Update business address, city, and county
Update business operating hours for specific days. Only provided days will be updated, other days remain unchanged. You can update all days at once or just specific days.

operating_hours.description: Operating hours object containing day(s) to update

example_all_days.description: Example: Update all days at once

operating_hours.monday.open: Opening time must be in HH:MM format (e.g., 08:00).

patch.description: Update delivery settings. Only provided fields will be updated, other fields remain unchanged. You can update all fields at once or just specific fields.

delivery_info.description: Delivery information object containing field(s) to update

delivery_info.fee: Delivery fee must be a number.

patch.description: Update business settings. Only provided fields will be updated, other fields remain unchanged. You can update all fields at once or just specific fields.

settings.description: Settings object containing field(s) to update

settings.currency: Currency must be a 3-letter code (e.g., KES, USD).

patch.description: Update social media links. Only provided fields will be updated, other fields remain unchanged. You can update all links at once or just specific links.

social_media.description: Social media object containing link(s) to update

example_all_fields.description: Example: Update all social media links

social_media.facebook: Facebook must be a valid URL.

get.description: Get all active business types with their categories for business details form
Get all active categories for a specific business type
Retrieve a paginated list of customers with optional filtering and sorting

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by customer name, email, phone, or customer number

items.example: The selected customer type is invalid.

post.description: Register a new customer in the system

date_of_birth.description: Customer date of birth (must be before today)

preferred_store_id.description: ID of the customer's preferred store (must be an active store)

items.example: The name field is required.
The email has already been taken.
The phone field is required.
The date of birth must be a date before today.
The selected customer type is invalid.
The selected preferred store id is invalid.
The credit limit must be at least 0.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific customer

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

delete.description: Soft delete a customer from the system. The customer can be restored later.

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

patch.description: Update customer information. All fields are optional - only provide fields that need updating.

date_of_birth.description: Customer date of birth (must be before today)

preferred_store_id.description: ID of the customer's preferred store (must be an active store)

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

items.example: The email has already been taken.
The phone has already been taken.
The selected preferred store id is invalid.

post.description: Restore a soft-deleted customer back to active status

404.description: Customer not found or not deleted

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Quick search for customers by name, email, phone, or customer number. Returns simplified customer list without pagination.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query - searches across name, email, phone, and customer number

data.description: Array of matching customers. Returns empty array if no matches found.

items.example: The q field is required.

patch.description: Upgrade customer to a higher tier type. Upgrades follow business rules: walk_in can upgrade to regular or vip (but not wholesale), regular can upgrade to vip, vip can upgrade to wholesale. Cannot downgrade customer types.

requestBody.description: New customer type to upgrade to

customer_type.description: Target customer type (must be a valid upgrade from current type)

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

422.description: Validation error or invalid upgrade path

oneOf.description: Validation error - missing or invalid customer_type

items.example: The customer type field is required.

oneOf.description: Business logic error - invalid upgrade path

patch.description: Toggle customer between active and inactive status. If customer is active, they become inactive and vice versa.

200.description: Customer status updated successfully - Active to Inactive

200-active.description: Customer status updated successfully - Inactive to Active

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customer groups with optional filtering and sorting

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by group name or description

members_count.description: Number of customers in this group

post.description: Create a new customer group with discount settings and approval requirements

discount_percentage.description: Automatic discount percentage for group members

requires_approval.description: Whether joining this group requires approval

items.example: The name field is required.
The discount percentage must be between 0 and 100.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific customer group

members_count.description: Number of customers in this group

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

patch.description: Update customer group information. All fields are optional - only provide fields that need updating.

requestBody.description: Customer group fields to update (all optional)

discount_percentage.description: Automatic discount percentage for group members

requires_approval.description: Whether joining this group requires approval

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

items.example: The name has already been taken.
The discount percentage must be between 0 and 100.

patch.description: Toggle customer group between active and inactive status. If group is active, it becomes inactive and vice versa.

200.description: Customer group status updated successfully - Active to Inactive

200-active.description: Customer group status updated successfully - Inactive to Active

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all customers belonging to a specific customer group

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Add a single customer to a customer group

customer_id.description: ID of the customer to add to the group

404.description: Customer group or customer not found

message.example: The requested resource was not found.
A record with similar data already exists.

items.example: The customer id field is required.

delete.description: Remove a customer from a customer group

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Customer ID to remove from the group

404.description: Customer group, customer, or membership not found

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Add multiple customers to a customer group in a single operation. Returns detailed results about which customers were added, skipped, or failed.

requestBody.description: Array of customer IDs to add to group

customer_ids.description: Array of customer IDs to add to the group

skipped.description: Number of customers skipped (already in group)

failed.description: Number of customers that failed to add

skipped.description: IDs of customers skipped (already in group)

failed.description: IDs of customers that failed to add

200-partial.description: Bulk operation completed with some skipped/failed

skipped.description: IDs of customers skipped (already in group)

failed.description: IDs of customers that failed to add (not found)

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

items.example: The customer ids field is required.

get.description: Retrieve a flat list of all expense categories with optional filtering for active categories only. Returns hierarchical metadata (level, full_path, parent) but in a flat list structure.

code.description: Auto-generated from name if not provided

description.example: Monthly store or office rent payments

parent_id.description: Parent category ID for hierarchical structure

is_recurring_eligible.description: Can be used for recurring expenses

requires_receipt.description: Receipt attachment required for expenses in this category

is_deletable.description: Can be deleted (false if has children or expenses)

parent.description: Parent category object (null for root categories)

post.description: Create a new expense category. Categories can be nested by providing a parent_id. The code is auto-generated from name if not provided.

code.description: Unique code (auto-generated from name if not provided, alphanumeric and dash/underscore only)

parent_id.description: Parent category ID for hierarchical structure

is_recurring_eligible.description: Allow recurring expenses in this category

items.example: The name field is required.
The code has already been taken.
The selected parent id is invalid.

get.description: Retrieve expense categories in a hierarchical tree structure with nested children. Useful for displaying category dropdowns and navigation menus.
Retrieve detailed information about a specific expense category including parent and children relationships

description.example: Monthly store or office rent payments

delete.description: Delete an expense category. Cannot delete if category has children or associated expenses.

409.description: Cannot delete - has children or expenses

patch.description: Update expense category details. All fields are optional. Cannot set self as parent.

get.description: Retrieve all direct children (subcategories) of a specific expense category. Returns only immediate children, not nested descendants.

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Toggle the is_active status of an expense category between true and false

get.description: Retrieve all expense categories that are marked as recurring-eligible (is_recurring_eligible = true). Useful for populating dropdowns when creating recurring expenses.

data.description: Array of categories with is_recurring_eligible = true

description.example: Monthly store or office rent payments

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of inventory records for a specific store with optional filtering by product, category, brand, stock status, and search query. Returns detailed inventory information including quantities, stock status, and product details.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by product name or SKU

is_low_stock.description: Whether available quantity is below reorder level

422.description: Validation error - Store ID is required

items.example: The store id field is required.
The selected product id is invalid.
The selected category id is invalid.
The selected brand id is invalid.
The selected stock status is invalid.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific inventory record by its ID. Returns complete inventory information including product details, quantities, stock status, and audit trail.

on_hand.description: Total quantity physically available in store

reserved.description: Quantity reserved for pending orders or transfers

available.description: Quantity available for immediate sale (on_hand - reserved)

damaged.description: Quantity of damaged/defective stock not available for sale

stock_status.description: Current stock status based on available quantity and reorder level

is_low_stock.description: True if available quantity is below or equal to reorder level

is_out_of_stock.description: True if available quantity is zero

reorder_level.description: Minimum quantity threshold before reordering is needed

last_stock_take_date.description: Date of last physical stock count

last_restocked_by.description: User who last restocked this product

403.description: Forbidden - User doesn't have permission to view this inventory record

get.description: Retrieve inventory records for a specific product across all stores. Returns a list of inventory records showing stock levels at each location where the product is stocked.

post.description: Check if sufficient stock is available for a specific product at a given store. Validates quantity against available inventory (on_hand - reserved) and returns availability status with detailed quantity information.

product_id.description: ID of the product to check

store_id.description: ID of the store to check inventory in

variant_id.description: ID of the product variant (optional, only if checking a specific variant)

quantity.description: Quantity to check availability for (must be positive)

uom_id.description: ID of the unit of measure for the requested quantity

200.description: Stock availability check completed - Stock available

requested_quantity.description: Requested quantity in the specified UOM

available_quantity.description: Available quantity that can be fulfilled in the requested UOM

requested_in_base_uom.description: Requested quantity converted to product's base UOM

available_in_base_uom.description: Total available quantity in product's base UOM

base_uom.description: Product's base unit of measure code

200.description: Stock availability check completed - Insufficient stock

available.description: False when requested quantity exceeds available stock

available_quantity.description: Maximum quantity that can be fulfilled

items.example: The product id field is required.
The store id field is required.
The quantity field must be at least 0.0001.
The selected uom id is invalid.

404.description: Resource not found (product, store, or UOM doesn't exist)

get.description: Retrieve a list of products with low stock levels at a specific store. Returns products where available quantity is below or equal to the reorder level. Optional threshold parameter allows custom low stock thresholds.

parameters.name: store_id
parameters.description: ID of the store to check (required)

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Optional custom threshold for low stock detection. If not provided, uses product's reorder_level. Products with available quantity <= threshold are considered low stock.

data.description: Array of inventory records with low stock. Empty array if no low stock products found.

422.description: Validation error - Store ID is required

get.description: Retrieve a list of products that are completely out of stock at a specific store. Returns products where available quantity (on_hand - reserved) is zero.

parameters.name: store_id
parameters.description: ID of the store to check (required)

200.description: Out of stock products retrieved successfully

message.example: Out of stock products retrieved successfully

data.description: Array of inventory records with zero available stock. Empty array if all products are in stock.

damaged.description: Damaged stock not available for sale

422.description: Validation error - Store ID is required

get.description: Calculate the total monetary value of inventory at a specific store. Optionally filter by a specific product. Returns total value based on base selling price × available quantity, along with quantity metrics and product count.

parameters.name: store_id
parameters.description: ID of the store to calculate inventory value for (required)

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: Optional product ID to calculate value for a specific product only

200.description: Inventory value calculated successfully - All products in store

total_value.description: Total monetary value of all inventory (base_selling_price × quantity_on_hand for all products)

total_quantity.description: Total quantity on hand across all products (in their respective base UOMs)

product_count.description: Number of distinct products included in calculation

currency.description: Currency code for the monetary values

200.description: Inventory value calculated successfully - Single product

total_value.description: Total value of the specific product (base_selling_price × quantity_on_hand)

total_quantity.description: Total quantity on hand for this product (in base UOM)

product_count.description: Always 1 when filtering by specific product

422.description: Validation error - Store ID is required

get.description: Retrieve a comprehensive summary of inventory metrics for a specific store. Returns aggregated statistics including product counts by stock status, total quantities, and total inventory value. Useful for dashboard displays and inventory overview.

parameters.name: store_id
parameters.description: ID of the store to get summary for (required)

total_products.description: Total number of distinct products in inventory at this store

in_stock_count.description: Number of products currently in stock (available > 0)

low_stock_count.description: Number of products with low stock (available <= reorder_level but > 0)

out_of_stock_count.description: Number of products completely out of stock (available = 0)

total_quantity.description: Total quantity on hand across all products (sum of quantity_on_hand in base UOMs)

total_reserved.description: Total quantity reserved across all products (sum of quantity_reserved in base UOMs)

total_available.description: Total quantity available for sale (sum of quantity_available in base UOMs)

total_value.description: Total monetary value of all inventory (sum of base_selling_price × quantity_on_hand)

422.description: Validation error - Store ID is required

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of inventory movements with optional filtering by store, product, movement type, and date range. Returns all types of inventory transactions including purchases, sales, adjustments, transfers, damages, etc.

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Filter movements from this date (inclusive, format: Y-m-d)

parameters.name: to_date
parameters.description: Filter movements up to this date (inclusive, format: Y-m-d, must be after or equal to from_date)

quantity.description: Signed quantity (negative for outbound, positive for inbound)

cost.description: Cost information (only present for movements with cost tracking)

balance_after.description: Inventory balance after this movement (in base UOM)

notes.example: 50 pieces damaged when forklift accident occurred. Packaging crushed and products unsellable.

from.description: First item number on current page

to.description: Last item number on current page

items.example: The selected store id is invalid.
The selected product id is invalid.
The selected movement type is invalid.
The from date field must be a valid date in Y-m-d format.
The to date field must be a date after or equal to from date.
The per page field must be between 1 and 100.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific inventory movement record by its ID. Returns complete information including store, product, quantities, costs, and audit trail.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the inventory movement record

quantity.description: Signed quantity in the specified UOM (positive for inbound, negative for outbound)

quantity_in_base_uom.description: Quantity converted to product's base UOM for inventory tracking

direction.description: Movement direction - 'in' increases inventory, 'out' decreases it

is_positive.description: Whether this movement increases available inventory

formatted_quantity.description: Human-readable quantity with sign and UOM

formatted_base_quantity.description: Human-readable base quantity with sign and UOM

cost.description: Cost information (only present for movements with cost tracking like purchases and adjustments)

unit_cost.description: Cost per unit in the movement's UOM

unit_cost_in_base_uom.description: Cost per unit in product's base UOM

total_cost.description: Total cost of this movement (quantity × unit_cost)

balance_after.description: Inventory balance after this movement was recorded (in base UOM)

notes.description: Additional notes or comments about this movement
notes.example: Setting up initial inventory for Product 1 (500 kg)

created_by.description: User who created this movement record

403.description: Forbidden - User doesn't have permission to view this movement

post.description: Create a new inventory adjustment record (increase or decrease) for a product in a specific store. This endpoint allows manual stock corrections, opening inventory setup, or other adjustments not related to sales, purchases, or transfers.

store_id.description: ID of the store where adjustment is being made

product_id.description: ID of the product being adjusted

variant_id.description: ID of the product variant (optional, only if adjusting a specific variant)

adjustment_type.description: Type of adjustment - increase adds stock, decrease removes stock

quantity.description: Quantity to adjust (must be positive, direction determined by adjustment_type)

uom_id.description: ID of the unit of measure for the quantity

reason.description: Reason for the adjustment (required for audit trail)

unit_cost.description: Unit cost per UOM (optional, used for inventory valuation)

notes.description: Additional notes or comments about the adjustment
notes.example: Setting up initial inventory for Product 2

quantity.description: Signed quantity (negative for decrease, positive for increase)

quantity_in_base_uom.description: Quantity converted to product's base UOM

balance_after.description: Inventory balance after this movement (in base UOM)

notes.example: Setting up initial inventory for Product 2

items.example: The store id field is required.
The selected product id is invalid.
The adjustment type field must be one of: increase, decrease.
The quantity field must be at least 0.0001.
The selected uom id is invalid.
The reason field is required.

404.description: Resource not found (store, product, or UOM doesn't exist)

post.description: Create a new inventory movement record for damaged/defective products. This endpoint removes stock from available inventory and tracks the loss due to damage, with reasons for audit purposes.

store_id.description: ID of the store where damage occurred

variant_id.description: ID of the product variant (optional, only if a specific variant is damaged)

quantity.description: Quantity of damaged goods (must be positive)

uom_id.description: ID of the unit of measure for the quantity

reason.description: Reason for the damage (required for audit and insurance claims)

notes.description: Additional details about the damage incident
notes.example: 50 pieces damaged when forklift accident occurred. Packaging crushed and products unsellable.

quantity_in_base_uom.description: Quantity converted to product's base UOM

balance_after.description: Inventory balance after recording damage (in base UOM)

notes.example: 50 pieces damaged when forklift accident occurred. Packaging crushed and products unsellable.

items.example: The store id field is required.
The selected product id is invalid.
The quantity field must be at least 0.0001.
The selected uom id is invalid.
The reason field is required.

404.description: Resource not found (store, product, or UOM doesn't exist)

get.description: Retrieve product batches with filtering options. Batches track inventory received from purchase orders with FIFO costing, expiry dates, and depletion tracking. Filter by store, product, variant, availability, or expiry timeframe.

parameters.name: only_available
parameters.description: Show only batches with remaining quantity (not depleted)

parameters.name: expiring_soon
parameters.description: Get batches expiring within specified number of days

schema.description: Number of days (e.g., 30 for batches expiring in next 30 days)

variant.description: Product variant if this batch is for a specific variant

purchase_order.description: Source purchase order for this batch

purchase_uom.description: Unit of measure used when receiving this batch

quantities.description: Quantity tracking in both purchase UOM and base UOM

received_in_base_uom.description: Received quantity in product's base UOM

cost_per_purchase_uom.description: Cost per purchase UOM from PO

days_until_expiry.description: Days remaining until expiry (null if no expiry date)

422.description: Validation error - Store ID is required

items.example: The store id field is required.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific product batch by ID. Includes complete tracking of quantities, costs (FIFO), expiry dates, depletion status, and source purchase order details.

post.description: Process goods receipt from a purchase order. Creates batch records for inventory tracking with FIFO costing, updates PO item quantities, updates inventory levels, and transitions PO status. Supports partial receipts and multiple items. Validates PO must be in 'sent', 'confirmed', or 'partially_received' status.

purchase_order_id.description: ID of the purchase order being received

items.description: Array of items being received (at least one required)

po_item_id.description: ID of the purchase order item being received

quantity.description: Quantity being received (in PO item's UOM)

manufacture_date.description: Manufacturing date for this batch (Y-m-d format)

expiry_date.description: Expiry date for this batch (Y-m-d format)

message.description: Message indicates how many batches were created

purchase_order.description: Updated purchase order with new receipt status

status.description: Status updated based on receipt - 'partially_received' or 'received'

value.description: 'partially_received' if some items pending, 'received' if all items fully received

items.description: PO items with updated receipt quantities and statuses

400.description: Invalid operation - PO cannot be received in current status

message.example: Failed to receive goods: Purchase order cannot be received. Current status: Draft

items.example: The purchase order id field is required.
The items field is required.
The items.0.quantity must be greater than 0.

get.description: Retrieve a list of purchase orders with optional filtering by store, status, and payment status. Returns comprehensive PO information including supplier details, items, costs, payment tracking, and workflow status with action permissions.

can_be_edited.description: Whether PO details can be modified

can_be_sent.description: Whether PO can be sent to supplier

subtotal.description: Sum of all line item subtotals (before tax and shipping)

variant.description: Product variant being ordered (null if base product)

ordered_in_base_uom.description: Ordered quantity in product's base UOM

422.description: Validation error - Store ID is required

items.example: The store id field is required.

post.description: Create a new purchase order for ordering inventory from a supplier. The PO starts in 'draft' status and can be edited before sending to supplier. Automatically calculates costs, taxes, totals, and generates unique PO number. Items can include product variants and custom tax rates.

supplier_id.description: ID of the supplier from whom products will be purchased

store_id.description: ID of the store that will receive the inventory

order_date.description: Date when order is created (Y-m-d format)

expected_delivery_date.description: Expected delivery date from supplier (Y-m-d format)

notes.description: General notes about the purchase order

items.description: Array of products to order (at least one item required)

product_id.description: ID of the product to order

variant_id.description: ID of the product variant (optional, only if ordering specific variant)

uom_id.description: ID of the unit of measure for this quantity

tax_rate_id.description: ID of the tax rate to apply (if applicable)

can_be_sent.description: Draft POs can be sent to supplier

can_be_received.description: Cannot receive items until PO is sent

subtotal.description: Sum of all item subtotals (before tax and shipping)

tax_amount.description: Total tax calculated from item tax rates

items.description: Ordered products with calculated costs and quantities

variant.description: Product variant details (null if base product ordered)

ordered_in_base_uom.description: Ordered quantity converted to product's base UOM

unit_cost.description: Cost per purchase UOM from request

unit_cost_in_base_uom.description: Cost converted to product's base UOM

tax_amount.description: Calculated tax for this line (subtotal × tax_rate)

created_by.description: User who created the purchase order

items.example: The supplier id field is required.
The store id field is required.
The items field is required.
The selected items.0.product id is invalid.
The items.0.quantity ordered field is required.
The items.0.unit cost must be at least 0.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific purchase order by its ID. Returns complete PO information including supplier, store, items with costs and quantities, payment status, and workflow permissions.

patch.description: Update a purchase order that is in 'draft' status. Only draft POs can be edited. Can update supplier, dates, shipping cost, notes, and items. Status automatically remains 'draft' until explicitly sent.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the purchase order to update

requestBody.description: Fields to update (all optional - send only what needs to change)

400.description: Invalid operation - PO is not in draft status

message.example: Only draft purchase orders can be updated.

items.example: The selected supplier id is invalid.

post.description: Mark purchase order as sent to supplier. Changes status from 'draft' to 'sent'. After sending, the PO can no longer be edited but can be received and cancelled. Typically triggers email/notification to supplier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the purchase order to send

message.example: Purchase order sent to supplier successfully

status.description: Status changes to 'sent' after successful send

400.description: Invalid operation - PO is not in draft status

message.example: Only draft purchase orders can be sent.

post.description: Cancel a purchase order. Can cancel draft or sent POs. Cannot cancel if any items have been received. Sets status to 'cancelled' and disables all workflow actions.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the purchase order to cancel

status.description: Status changes to 'cancelled' - all actions disabled

can_be_received.description: Cannot receive items from cancelled PO

400.description: Invalid operation - Cannot cancel PO with received items

message.example: Cannot cancel purchase order with received items.

get.description: Retrieve a list of stock transfers with optional filtering by store, direction, and status. Returns transfer records with items, approval workflow details, and status tracking information.

parameters.name: store_id
parameters.description: Filter by store ID (required). Returns transfers where this store is either source or destination based on direction parameter.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Filter by transfer direction relative to the specified store

status.description: Current transfer status in approval/shipping workflow

variant.description: Product variant if specific variant is being transferred

quantity_sent.description: Quantity actually sent (updated when transfer is dispatched)

quantity_received.description: Quantity received (updated when transfer is completed)

quantity_requested_in_base_uom.description: Requested quantity in product's base UOM

has_discrepancy.description: True if received quantity differs from sent quantity

requested_by.description: User who created the transfer request

sent_at.description: When transfer was dispatched from source store

received_at.description: When transfer was received at destination store

rejection_reason.description: Reason for cancellation (only present if cancelled)

422.description: Validation error - Store ID is required

items.example: The store id field is required.

post.description: Create a new stock transfer request to move inventory between stores. The transfer starts in 'pending' status and requires approval before items can be sent. Validates that source and destination stores are different and that all products exist.

from_store_id.description: ID of the source store (where inventory will be taken from)

to_store_id.description: ID of the destination store (where inventory will be received)

expected_arrival_date.description: Expected delivery date at destination store (Y-m-d format)

items.description: Array of products to transfer (at least one item required)

product_id.description: ID of the product to transfer

variant_id.description: ID of the product variant (optional, only if transferring a specific variant)

uom_id.description: ID of the unit of measure for this quantity

items.example: The from store id field is required.
The to store id must be different from from store id.
The items field is required.
The selected items.0.product id is invalid.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific stock transfer by its ID. Returns complete transfer information including items, approval workflow details, timestamps, and status tracking.

from_store.description: Source store where inventory is being transferred from

to_store.description: Destination store where inventory will be received

variant.description: Product variant being transferred (null if base product)

quantity_sent.description: Quantity dispatched from source (0 until sent)

quantity_received.description: Quantity received at destination (0 until completed)

has_discrepancy.description: True if quantity_received differs from quantity_sent

requested_by.description: User who initiated the transfer request

rejection_reason.description: Cancellation reason (only present if status is cancelled)

403.description: Forbidden - User doesn't have permission to view this transfer

post.description: Approve a pending stock transfer request. Validates that sufficient inventory is available at the source store for all requested items. Changes status from 'pending' to 'approved'. Only transfers in 'pending' status can be approved.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the stock transfer to approve

status.description: Status changes to 'approved' after successful approval

400.description: Insufficient stock at source store

message.example: Failed to approve transfer: Insufficient stock for product Samsung Galaxy  5G 128GB. Available: 0, Requested: 30.0000

403.description: Forbidden - User doesn't have permission to approve transfers

post.description: Mark an approved transfer as sent/dispatched from the source store. Deducts inventory from the source store and changes status to 'in_transit'. Only approved transfers can be sent.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the stock transfer to send

message.example: Transfer sent successfully. Inventory deducted from source store.

400.description: Invalid operation

message.example: Transfer must be approved before it can be sent.

post.description: Mark a transfer as received at the destination store. Records actual quantities received (which may differ from quantities sent) and adds inventory to the destination store. Changes status to 'completed'. Only transfers in 'in_transit' status can be received.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the stock transfer to receive

requestBody.description: Received quantities for each transfer item

received_items.description: Object with transfer item IDs as keys and received quantities as values

additionalProperties.description: Quantity received for the item (in the item's UOM)

message.example: Transfer received successfully. Inventory added to destination store.

actual_arrival_date.description: Actual delivery date recorded at receipt

items.example: The received items field is required.

400.description: Invalid operation

message.example: Transfer must be in transit before it can be received.

post.description: Cancel a pending or approved stock transfer. Requires a cancellation reason. Changes status to 'cancelled'. Cannot cancel transfers that have already been sent or completed.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the stock transfer to cancel

reason.description: Reason for cancelling the transfer (required for audit trail)

items.example: The reason field is required.

400.description: Invalid operation - Transfer cannot be cancelled in current status

message.example: Transfer cannot be cancelled. It has already been sent or completed.

get.description: Retrieve a list of stock transfers that are pending approval. Optionally filter by source store. Returns transfers with 'pending' status that require manager/admin approval before they can be sent.

parameters.name: store_id
parameters.description: Filter by source store ID (optional). Returns pending transfers from this specific store.

rejection_reason.description: May be set if transfer was previously cancelled then recreated

403.description: Forbidden - User doesn't have permission to view pending approvals

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of coupons with optional filtering and sorting

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by coupon code or description

description.example: Get 10% off on all electronic brands

status.description: Computed status: Active, Inactive, Expired, Upcoming

post.description: Create a new discount coupon with applicability rules for products, categories, or brands

code.description: Unique coupon code (uppercase letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores only)

min_purchase_amount.description: Minimum purchase amount required to use coupon

usage_limit.description: Total number of times coupon can be used

applicability.description: Applicability rules based on applicable_to type

categories.description: Category IDs to attach (for specific_categories type)

brands.description: Brand IDs to attach (for specific_brands type)

The valid until must be a date after valid from.
Categories are required when applicable_to is specific_categories.

is_valid.description: Is currently valid (within date range and active)

can_be_used.description: Can currently be used by customers

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

delete.description: Soft delete a coupon from the system. The coupon can be restored later if needed.

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

patch.description: Update coupon information. All fields are optional - only provide fields that need updating. Note: Some fields cannot be updated if coupon has been used.

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

patch.description: Activate a coupon to make it available for use by customers

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

patch.description: Deactivate a coupon to prevent it from being used by customers

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

category_ids.description: Array of category IDs to attach to the coupon

Can only attach categories to coupons with applicable_to set to specific_categories.

delete.description: Remove a specific category from a coupon's applicability rules

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

brand_ids.description: Array of brand IDs to attach to the coupon

description.example: Get 10% off on all electronic brands

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

items.example: The brand ids field is required.
Can only attach brands to coupons with applicable_to set to specific_brands.

delete.description: Remove a specific brand from a coupon's applicability rules

description.example: Get 10% off on all electronic brands

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Attach multiple products (with optional variants) to a coupon. Only works for coupons with applicable_to set to 'specific_products' or 'all_products'.

products.description: Array of products to attach to the coupon

product_variant_id.description: Product variant ID (optional, null for base product)

description.example: Get 10% off on all electronic brands

delete.description: Remove a specific product (including all its variants) from a coupon's applicability rules

description.example: Get 10% off on all electronic brands

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

post.description: Attach multiple products (with optional variants) to a coupon in a single request. Only works for coupons with applicable_to set to 'specific_products' or 'all_products'.

requestBody.description: Products to attach in bulk (with optional variants)

products.description: Array of products to attach to the coupon

product_variant_id.description: Product variant ID (optional, null for base product)

200.description: Products bulk attached to coupon successfully

message.example: Products bulk attached to coupon successfully

description.example: Get 10% off on all electronic brands

delete.description: Remove multiple products (including all their variants) from a coupon's applicability rules in a single request

requestBody.description: Product IDs to detach in bulk

product_ids.description: Array of product IDs to detach from the coupon

200.description: Products bulk detached from coupon successfully

message.example: Products bulk detached from coupon successfully

description.example: Get 10% off on all electronic brands

message.example: The requested resource was not found.

items.example: The product ids field is required.

get.description: Retrieve all coupons that are currently valid, active, and available for use by customers. Returns only coupons where is_valid=true, is_active=true, not expired, and not exhausted.

min_purchase_amount.description: Minimum purchase required to use this coupon

usage_limit.description: Total usage limit across all customers

usage_count.description: Number of times coupon has been used

is_valid.description: Always true for available coupons (within valid date range)

is_exhausted.description: Always false for available coupons (not reached usage limit)

status.description: Current status - will always be 'Active' for available coupons

can_be_edited.description: Whether coupon can still be edited (false if already used)

get.description: Retrieves a list of brands with optional filtering and pagination capabilities.

post.description: Creates a new product brand with optional logo upload. Slug is auto-generated from the name if not provided.

slug.description: Optional brand slug. Auto-generated if not provided

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific brand including associated products and product count.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a brand. The brand must not have any associated products. Associated logo will also be deleted.

400.description: Cannot delete brand with associated products

patch.description: Activates a brand, making it visible and available for use.
Deactivates a brand, making it hidden and unavailable for use.
Marks a brand as featured, giving it prominence in listings.
Removes the featured status from a brand.

logo.description: Brand logo image file (JPG, PNG,JPEG, WEBP)

422.description: Validation error - Invalid file type or size

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all product bundles with their items, pricing, and availability information. Returns up to 15 bundles per page.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token

post.description: Creates a new product bundle with optional items. Bundle price must be provided, and if items are included, at least 2 items are required.

base_uom_id.description: Base unit of measure ID (e.g., pieces)

items.description: Array of bundle items (minimum 2 items if provided)

product_variant_id.description: Specific variant ID or null for base product

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token

delete.description: Permanently deletes a product bundle. This action cannot be undone.

description.example: Complete breakfast package for family and friends

data.description: Complete bundle object with updated information (same structure as GET /bundles/{id})

patch.description: Updates the quantity or UOM of an existing item in a bundle. All fields are optional.

Updates the bundle price and optional online price.

422.description: Validation error - invalid file type or size

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, code, city, or region

post.description: Creates a new store with the provided details. The store will be automatically assigned a unique code.

is_main_store.description: Whether this is the main store

manager_id.description: Manager user ID (must have manager/owner role)

items.example: Store name is required.
Store address is required.
Phone number must be a valid Kenyan phone number.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific store including manager, creator, and updater information.

patch.description: Update only specific store details. Only provided fields will be updated, other fields remain unchanged.

requestBody.description: Store details to update (all fields are optional)

patch.description: Sets the store as the main store. Any existing main store will be automatically unset.

200.description: Store set as main store successfully

message.example: Store set as main store successfully

patch.description: Activates a store, making it available for use.
Deactivates a store. Cannot deactivate if it's the only active store.

400.description: Cannot deactivate the only active store

message.example: Cannot deactivate the only active store. At least one store must remain active.

post.description: Assigns a manager to the store. The user must have manager or owner role.

manager_id.description: Manager user ID (must have manager or owner role)

items.example: The selected manager must be a user with manager or owner role.

delete.description: Removes the assigned manager from the store.

get.summary: List all products assigned to a store
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all products assigned to a specific store with filtering, searching, and sorting. Returns both base products and variants as separate entries. Includes pricing, inventory, and variant information.

parameters.name: store
parameters.description: Store ID (optional if tenant has only one active store - auto-detected)

parameters.name: has_price_override
parameters.description: Filter products with store-specific price overrides

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by product name or SKU (case-insensitive)

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort field: product.name, product.sku, is_available, created_at, updated_at

variant.description: Only present if this is a variant assignment

400.description: Bad Request - Multiple stores or invalid store

message.example: Multiple stores exist. Please specify store_id...

post.description: Assigns one or more products to a specific store with optional configuration. Supports automatic assignment of product variants and bundles. When auto_assign_variants is true, all active variants are automatically assigned.

parameters.name: store
parameters.description: Store ID (optional if tenant has only one active store - auto-detected)

product_ids.description: Array of product IDs to assign (minimum 1)

auto_assign_variants.description: Automatically assign all active variants of variable products

auto_assign_bundles.description: Automatically assign bundles containing these products

store_selling_price.description: Store-specific price override. If null, uses product's base selling price

min_stock_level.description: Store-specific minimum stock threshold. If 0, uses product's reorder level

updated.description: Product IDs that were already assigned and got updated

skipped.description: Products that failed assignment with reasons

400.description: Bad Request - Multiple stores or invalid store

message.example: Multiple stores exist. Please specify store_id...

items.example: At least one product must be selected.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific product assigned to a store. Returns comprehensive product details, variant information (if applicable), pricing hierarchy, and inventory status. The product parameter is the store_products.id, not products.id.

parameters.name: store
parameters.description: Store ID (optional if tenant has only one active store)

parameters.name: product
parameters.description: Store product assignment ID (from store_products table, not products.id)

data.description: Same structure as items in the list endpoint

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid store

delete.description: Removes a product assignment from a store. This does not delete the product itself, only the assignment to this specific store. The product remains available in other stores and can be reassigned later.

parameters.name: store
parameters.description: Store ID (optional if tenant has only one active store)

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid store

patch.description: Updates store-specific settings for an assigned product. All fields are optional - only include what you want to change. Set store_selling_price to null to remove price override. Set min_stock_level to 0 to remove stock level override.

parameters.name: store
parameters.description: Store ID (optional if tenant has only one active store)

store_selling_price.description: Store-specific price. Set to null to use base price

min_stock_level.description: Store-specific minimum stock. Set to 0 to use product reorder level

data.description: Updated store product object (same structure as GET response)

items.example: Store selling price cannot be negative.

patch.description: Updates the availability status of a product in a store. This is a convenience endpoint for quickly enabling/disabling products.

parameters.name: store
parameters.description: Store ID (optional if tenant has only one active store)

items.example: The is available field must be true or false.

get.description: Retrieves statistical summary of products in a store including counts of total products, available/unavailable products, products with price overrides, and stock status counts.

parameters.name: store
parameters.description: Store ID (optional if tenant has only one active store)

total_products.description: Total number of products assigned to store

available_products.description: Number of products marked as available

unavailable_products.description: Number of products marked as unavailable

price_overrides.description: Number of products with store-specific pricing

low_stock_products.description: Number of products below minimum stock level

out_of_stock_products.description: Number of products with zero stock

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid store

get.description: Retrieves a list of suppliers with optional filtering, searching, and pagination capabilities.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search suppliers by name, contact person, email, or phone

supplier_type_description.example: Distributes products from manufacturers to retailers

payment_terms_description.example: Payment due within 30 days of invoice date

notes.example: Expanded operations to include distribution services

post.description: Creates a new supplier with contact and business information. Default payment terms is 'cod' and credit limit is 0.00.

notes.example: Specializes in electronic components and hardware manufacturing

payment_terms_description.example: Payment due upon delivery of goods

notes.example: Specializes in electronic components and hardware manufacturing

items.example: The selected supplier type is invalid.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific supplier including products and product count.

supplier_type_description.example: Distributes products from manufacturers to retailers

payment_terms_description.example: Payment due within 30 days of invoice date

notes.example: Expanded operations to include distribution services

patch.description: Updates supplier contact and address information. Only provided fields will be updated.

requestBody.description: Personal details to update (all fields are optional)

payment_terms_description.example: Payment due upon delivery of goods

notes.example: Specializes in electronic components and hardware manufacturing

patch.description: Updates supplier credit limit, payment terms, and bank account details. Only provided fields will be updated.

requestBody.description: Financial details to update (all fields are optional)

supplier_type_description.example: Distributes products from manufacturers to retailers

payment_terms_description.example: Payment due within 30 days of invoice date

notes.example: Expanded operations to include distribution services

items.example: The selected payment terms is invalid.
Credit limit cannot be negative

patch.description: Toggles the active status of a supplier. If currently active, it will be deactivated and vice versa.

get.description: Retrieves available options for supplier types and payment terms. Useful for populating form dropdowns.

example.label: Distributor
example.description: Distributes products from manufacturers to retailers

example.label: Wholesaler
example.description: Sells products in bulk to retailers or other businesses

description.example: Payment due upon delivery of goods

example.label: Cash on Delivery
example.description: Payment due upon delivery of goods

example.label: Net 7 Days
example.description: Payment due within 7 days of invoice date

example.label: Net 15 Days
example.description: Payment due within 15 days of invoice date

example.label: Net 30 Days
example.description: Payment due within 30 days of invoice date

example.label: Net 60 Days
example.description: Payment due within 60 days of invoice date

example.label: Net 90 Days
example.description: Payment due within 90 days of invoice date

get.description: Retrieves a list of tax rates with optional filtering and pagination capabilities.

post.description: Creates a new tax rate. Cannot create a duplicate tax rate for the same name and effective date. If is_default is true, any existing default tax rate will be unset.

tax_name.description: Tax name (e.g., VAT, GST, Sales Tax)

effective_from.description: Date when this tax rate becomes effective (YYYY-MM-DD)

effective_until.description: Optional end date for this tax rate (YYYY-MM-DD)

is_active.description: Whether the tax rate is active (default: true)

is_default.description: Whether this is the default tax rate (default: false)

500.description: Failed to create - Duplicate tax rate

message.example: Failed to create tax rate: A tax rate VAT already exists for the date 2025-12-17.

patch.description: Toggles the active status of a tax rate. If currently active, it will be deactivated and vice versa.
Toggles the default status of a tax rate. Cannot remove default status if this is the only default tax rate. When setting a new default, any existing default will be automatically unset.

200.description: Tax rate default status toggled successfully

400.description: Cannot remove default status

message.example: Cannot remove default status. At least one tax rate must be default

patch.summary: Update tax rate effective until date
patch.description: Updates the effective_until date for a tax rate. This defines when the tax rate expires.

effective_until.description: Date when this tax rate expires (YYYY-MM-DD). Must be after effective_from date.

422.description: Validation error - Invalid date or date before effective_from

get.description: Check if current tenant has valid access (business status, subscription)
Get current tenant subscription details
Retrieve a paginated list of units of measure with optional filters for type, source, base unit status, and active status

message.example: Failed to retrieve units of measure

post.description: Create a new custom unit of measure. Only custom units can be created (system units are pre-defined)

is_base_unit.description: Whether this is a base unit (default: false)

201.description: Custom unit of measure created successfully

message.example: Custom unit of measure created successfully

items.example: This unit code already exists in your system.
Unit type must be one of: count, weight, volume, length, area, time.

message.example: Failed to create unit of measure

error.example: A base unit already exists for type: count

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific unit of measure including its conversions

message.example: Failed to retrieve unit of measure

patch.description: Update an existing custom unit of measure. Note: System-defined units cannot be updated

200.description: Custom unit of measure updated successfully

message.example: Custom unit of measure updated successfully

400.description: Cannot update system units

message.example: System-defined units of measure cannot be updated.

items.example: This unit code already exists in your system.

message.example: Failed to update unit of measure

error.example: A base unit already exists for type: count

get.summary: Get conversion options for a unit
get.description: Retrieve all compatible units of measure that can be converted to/from the specified unit (same type only)

post.description: Set a unit of measure as the base unit for its type. Automatically removes base flag from any existing base unit of the same type to ensure only one base unit exists per type

400.description: Unit is already a base unit

message.example: This unit is already a base unit.
Failed to set base unit flag

delete.description: Remove the base unit flag from a unit of measure. Only applicable if the unit is currently marked as a base unit

400.description: Unit is not a base unit

message.example: This unit is not a base unit.
Failed to remove base unit flag

post.description: Create a conversion between two units of measure of the same type

to_uom_id.description: Target unit ID (must be different from source)

items.example: A conversion between these units already exists.
Source and target units must be different.
Conversion factor must be greater than zero.

message.example: Cannot create conversion between different types: weight and volume

error.example: Cannot create conversion between different types: weight and volume

delete.description: Remove a conversion between two units of measure

patch.description: Update the conversion factor of an existing conversion

conversion_factor.description: New conversion factor (> 0, max 6 decimal places)

items.example: Conversion factor must be greater than zero.

post.description: Calculate the converted quantity between two units of measure (utility endpoint)

items.example: The quantity field is required.
The selected from uom id is invalid.
The selected to uom id is invalid.

message.example: Cannot convert between different UOM types: weight and volume

error.example: Cannot convert between different UOM types: weight and volume

get.description: Get all users in this tenant (owner/manager only)

post.description: Create new user with auto-generated password sent via email (owner/manager only)

201.description: User created successfully. Credentials sent to email.

delete.description: Delete user (owner only, cannot delete yourself or last owner)

400.description: Cannot delete yourself or last owner

patch.description: Update user details (owner/manager only)

post.description: Assign or change user role (owner only)

get.description: Get all roles with their permissions

CustomerTypeUpgradeRules.title: Customer Type Upgrade Rules
CustomerTypeUpgradeRules.description: Business rules for customer type upgrades

wholesale.description: wholesale customers cannot upgrade further (highest tier)

roles.description: Array of role names assigned to the user

items.example: admin

permissions.description: Array of permission names assigned to the user

items.example: manage-businesses
